title: Move a Repo query from mount/3 to handle_params/3
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/customers_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.CustomersLive) that loads MyApp.Sales.list_customers/0 in handle_params/3 instead of mount/3. mount/3 must return {:ok, assign(socket, :customers, [])}. handle_params/3 must assign :customers from Sales.list_customers/0. The render/1 body must iterate @customers with :for. Use `use MyAppWeb, :live_view`.

must_not_contain:
def mount(_params, _session, socket) do
    customers = Sales.list_customers

tier_rationale: Single-step move with a canonical placement. The Iron Law 'NO DATABASE QUERIES IN MOUNT' makes this a well-known mechanical fix.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes/claude-code-elixir phoenix-thinking SKILL.md Iron Law: NO DATABASE QUERIES IN MOUNT
